review_scope: PTC Website Redesign - Full Site Assessment

missing_program_information.consensus: Program pages cannot drive enrollment without cost, timeline, job outcomes, start dates

broken_enrollment_pathway.consensus: Apply buttons non-functional; tuition missing; no clear next steps

accessibility_gaps.consensus: 11 detailed issues require attention; most are low-effort fixes

campus_program_accuracy.consensus: St. Pete lists programs not offered; program detail pages missing

current_student_friction.consensus: Student portal dead; schedule hard to find; campus info missing

critical_blockers: Missing program cost/length/dates on all program pages
All CTA buttons link to placeholder (#) instead of live portal
Student Portal link dead on homepage
high_priority_gaps: Program detail pages only for Welding (others missing)
No campus hours or facility info
No job outcomes or salary data
Program filtering architecture conflict with CMS
architecture_decisions_needed: Hero carousel (keep vanilla JS or simplify to single image?)
Program filtering (remove live filters or build category nav?)
Mobile menu (use Composer's built-in or custom override?)
Font delivery (Finalsite admin panel vs. inline @import?)
notes: 8-agent review captured consensus across all stakeholder perspectives. Consolidated 42 unique issues into critical (7), high (13), medium (12), low (10) tiers. Five cross-agent patterns identified. Phase 1 completion required before launch. Full remediation timeline 6-8 weeks.
